title: Medieval Deco
description: Deco around the theme Medieval for 1.16 - 1.20 [Forge|Fabric]
body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/ZTU8CGI.jpg)

<center>

## Medieval Deco for Forge and Fabric


### 📖 About:

This mod adds many new decorative blocks to the game.  
Including barrels, furniture and other things from the Middle Ages
</center>

---

### ✅ Features:

New decorative blocks
Adds signs and barrels

### ❇️ Updates:  

An update is planned to add some new blocks and functionality to the signs. \
***Release date:** Q1/Q2 2024* 

### ❓ F.A.Q.:

**<u>Can you bring out the mod for 1.12?</u>** \
I do not plan to bring out the mod for 1.12  
<u>**Can i use this mod in a modpack?</u>**\
Sure! Go ahead :P
